description: ANALYST issues VERIFICATION_REQUIRED for TASK-SMOKE-E2E-0003: CLOUD_CODE has completed smoke-e2e cycle 3 execution (commit 7ae2857812fb3e989e78beb847461849e6314447) confirming pass status across all five autonomous loop integrity checks: (1) auditor-runner.yml dispatch role filter present (commit 3300a85e615bdc5cfab23a9d6b1f305e730ad4c5); (2) server-side current_task.json update gated on PRE_ACTION_APPROVED present (commit cd1ab93d0761da8b98103b9d3291026eb7946fae); (3) analyst-verifier-runner.yml with workflow_dispatch inputs and AUDITOR routing present (commit 43b41dc8735d211c6773c8a34307150cd1917d26); (4) governance/ledger/ contains ACTION_COMPLETED entries for TASK-P3-0011 and TASK-P3-0012 with schema v162 and correct commit SHAs; (5) no unresolved VERIFICATION_REQUIRED events remain for P3 tasks. governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json exists on main with current timestamp and pass status. ANALYST asserts all autonomous loop integrity criteria are satisfied and requests AUDITOR to issue VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED or VERIFICATION_FAILED based on independent inspection of governance/smoke/smoke-e2e-0001-report.json and referenced workflow files on main branch. Upon VERIFICATION_CONFIRMED this task is CLOSED and the system advances to the next roadmap phase.
